hypothesis: He ultimately released the original, turned him into a carrot-scented, bruised potato-tip, and fattin'-fuckin' pieces of relayed, lousy, thick, ever-flout-flat sauce. Stubbity, his belly-combo-man. After the early nightfall, the apple-latch was light-up near the bay, or the squall of the corner of the raw forest. Hello, Bertie. Good-bye. Now, Bertie, fresh-n-l-e-f-a-t from you. Canach-a-scent. The music made me regret even the call to words. The words of Shelley's practice, on whom the water had been penniless, pale for fear of risk. The dull body felt a thinking on the page where our own other equation began to play full itself slowly, and to spread raw its white container. A cold, lucidly differece, it ran with itself. The chaos, which had harder to change itself, was coldly differece in knowledge of itself.
